rbaHistory.note: First cut since Nov 2020 — CPI back in 2-3% band
Held; trimmed mean CPI above target
Held; Q1 CPI surprised to upside

news.title: ASX dips as NAB warns on economic uncertainty; a2Milk recall
news.snippet: The local sharemarket lost ground as uncertainty over the war in Iran lingered, with Tuesday’s Reserve Bank decision on interest rates a focus for investors.

news.title: ASX set to fall, oil jumps on war uncertainty; RBA decision ahead; GameStop makes $78b bid for eBay
news.snippet: The US stock market is falling from its record heights while oil prices jump following escalations in the Middle East that may be undermining the ceasefire in the war with Iran.

news.title: ‘Tax cut?’ Key budget question
news.snippet: Labor is keeping tight-lipped about what will be in the upcoming federal budget, including whether Australians will get more money back from the commonwealth.

news.title: Australians’ Uber obsession nears $15 billion a year
news.snippet: Despite recording a gross profit of more than $2 billion, Uber Australia is boasting that it will not be hit with local payroll tax.

news.title: State in crisis as One Nation surges
news.snippet: Australia’s most indebted state will hand down a budget on Tuesday – just seven months from an election – amid grim forecasts debt interest is set to hit $28m per day.

news.title: Albo will target family trusts in budget to deliver ‘fair crack’ to PAYG taxpayers
news.snippet: Wealthy Aussie families who are using trusts to legally dodge tax are officially in the budget’s firing line.

news.title: Major chain crowned ‘best’ Aussie supermarket
news.snippet: A major supermarket chain has claimed the crown for being the “best” supermarket in Australia - for the sixth time in a row.

news.title: No choice’: Experts’ grim RBA rate call
news.snippet: Three-quarters of economists and experts have a grim prediction for households ahead of the RBA’s interest rate meeting.

news.title: Ardea lands Japanese Government backing for giant WA nickel play
news.snippet: Ardea Resources’ giant Goongarrie nickel-cobalt project has been named in an Australia-Japan pact, highlighting its scale, funding support and a role in global supply chains.

news.title: Tony Burke says migrants are the ‘solution, not the problem’, defends pre-election citizenship ceremonies
news.snippet: Tony Burke has declared immigration is the “solution, not the problem” for the housing crisis — and revealed the first thing he says to new Indian-Australian citizens.

news.title: How to ‘hide’ cash to get more age pension
news.snippet: A financial expert has revealed nine ways you can legally “hide” your money to boost your age pension entitlement.

news.title: Qantas, Virgin lag foreign airlines on customer satisfaction
news.snippet: The survey of Australians’ air travel behaviour experiences paints a picture of resigned customers, accustomed not to seek remedies when disruptions occur.
